evidence.auth_system: Bearer token auth with role-based access (auth.ts)
evidence.fail_closed: fail_closed mode requires auth keys — no anonymous access in production
evidence.service_role: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY used only by API (canonical writer)

proofs.notes: Bearer token auth with 5 roles. fail_closed mode requires keys. Supabase RLS enabled. Service role key restricted to API only.

evidence.api_roles: 5 API key roles: operator, submitter, settler, poster, worker
evidence.member_tiers: 6 member tiers: free, trial, vip, vip-plus, capper, operator
evidence.access_surfaces: TIER_ACCESS map in member-lifecycle.ts — per-tier surface access
evidence.route_auth: All POST routes require Authorization: Bearer <key>
evidence.jwt_enforcement: Capper JWT claim overrides form submittedBy (UTV2-658)

proofs.notes: 5 API roles + 6 member tiers. TIER_ACCESS map defines per-tier surface access. All write routes auth-gated. JWT enforcement for capper identity.

proofs.control: Secrets are not stored in code

evidence.validate_env: validate-env.mjs warns about secrets in .env (shared file)
evidence.ci_secrets: GitHub Actions secrets for CI workflows — not in code

proofs.notes: .env.example contains no real tokens. local.env is gitignored. validate-env.mjs warns about secrets in shared files. 22 secrets inventoried in SECRETS_INVENTORY.md.

gating: All POST routes require Bearer auth
evidence.merge_gate: merge-gate.yml gates code merges by tier + PM verdict

proofs.notes: All sensitive operations auth-gated: per-role API keys, merge-gate for code, governance brake for auto-routing, writer authority for field-level access.
